title: Anonymised IPFS gateway logs from 7th of March of 2022 to 21st of March of 2022
author: Costa, Pedro Ákos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The dataset includes anonymised IPFS gateway logs of the ipfs.io gateway. 

 The dataset includes logs from two weeks in March of 2022 (from the 7th to the 21st). 

 The data has been anonymised by removing the IP addresses contained in the log files. We provide a map id csv file that matches the replaced IP address with an id to the geographical location and ASN of the IP address.
steps_raw:
The dataset includes anonymised IPFS gateway logs of the ipfs.io gateway. 

 The dataset includes logs from two weeks in March of 2022 (from the 7th to the 21st). 

 The data has been anonymised by removing the IP addresses contained in the log files. We provide a map id csv file that matches the replaced IP address with an id to the geographical location and ASN of the IP address.
